title: helanthium parvulum
intro: Helanthium parvulum, also known as the lesser duckweed or American duckweed, is a floating aquatic plant that belongs to the family Araceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, pain relief, and wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine. Helanthium parvulum can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often combined with other herbs for enhanced benefits.
